sqlQuery.name: AllCommunityDatasets
sqlQuery.sql: SELECT CONCAT('EDAUD_', user_dataset_id) as dataset_id FROM @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@AvailableUserDatasets WHERE is_public = true and is_owner = 1 AND (project_id = '@PROJECT_ID@' or ('UniDB' = '@PROJECT_ID@' and 'ClinEpiDB' != '@PROJECT_ID@'))

sqlQuery.name: All
sqlQuery.sql: select CONCAT('EDAUD_', user_dataset_id) as dataset_id, project_id as project, category, name, name as display_name, name as hyperlinkName, description, summary from @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@AvailableUserDatasets where is_owner = 1

sqlQuery.name: OwnerInfo
sqlQuery.sql: SELECT CONCAT('EDAUD_', d.dataset_id) as dataset_id, TRIM(COALESCE(first_name || ' ', '') || COALESCE(middle_name || ' ', '') || COALESCE(last_name, '')) as owner_name, organization as owner_organization from @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@dataset d, @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@AvailableUserDatasets aud, (select * from public.crosstab( 'select user_id, key, value from @REMOTE_USERACCOUNTS_SCHEMA@account_properties where key in (''first_name'', ''organization'', ''middle_name'', ''last_name'') order by user_id, key', 'SELECT unnest(ARRAY[''first_name'', ''last_name'', ''middle_name'', ''organization''])') as userinfo ( user_id bigint, first_name varchar(4000), last_name varchar(4000), middle_name varchar(4000), organization varchar(4000)) ) userinfo where d.owner = userinfo.user_id and user_dataset_id = d.dataset_id and is_owner = 1

sqlQuery.name: DescriptiveMetadata
sqlQuery.sql: SELECT CONCAT('EDAUD_', dataset_id) as dataset_id, program_name, project_name, FROM @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@dataset_meta, @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@AvailableUserDatasets where dataset_id = user_dataset_id and is_owner = 1

sqlQuery.name: publications
sqlQuery.sql: select CONCAT('EDAUD_', dp.dataset_id) as dataset_id, external_id as publication_id, citation from @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@dataset_publication dp, @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@AvailableUserDatasets where dataset_id = user_dataset_id and is_owner = 1

sqlQuery.name: contacts
sqlQuery.sql: select CONCAT('EDAUD_', dc.dataset_id) as dataset_id, concat(dc.first_name, ' ', dc.middle_name, ' ', dc.last_name) as contact_name, affiliation from @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@dataset_contact dc, @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@AvailableUserDatasets where dataset_id = user_dataset_id and is_owner = 1

sqlQuery.name: organisms
sqlQuery.sql: select CONCAT('EDAUD_', dorg.dataset_id) as dataset_id, species || ' ' || strain as organism_name from @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@dataset_organism dorg, @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@AvailableUserDatasets where dorg.dataset_id = user_dataset_id and is_owner = 1

sqlQuery.name: hyperlinks
sqlQuery.sql: select CONCAT('EDAUD_', dh.dataset_id) as dataset_id, dh.description from @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@dataset_hyperlink dh, @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@AvailableUserDatasets where dataset_id = user_dataset_id and is_owner = 1

sqlQuery.name: associatedFactors
sqlQuery.sql: select CONCAT('EDAUD_', daf.dataset_id) as dataset_id, factor from @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@dataset_associated_factor daf, @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@AvailableUserDatasets where dataset_id = user_dataset_id and is_owner = 1

sqlQuery.name: fundingAwards
sqlQuery.sql: select CONCAT('EDAUD_', dfa.dataset_id) as dataset_id, agency, award_number from @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@dataset_funding_award dfa, @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@AvailableUserDatasets where dataset_id = user_dataset_id and is_owner = 1

sqlQuery.name: countries
sqlQuery.sql: select CONCAT('EDAUD_', dc.dataset_id) as dataset_id, country from @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@dataset_country dc, @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@AvailableUserDatasets where dataset_id = user_dataset_id and is_owner = 1

sqlQuery.name: species
sqlQuery.sql: select CONCAT('EDAUD_', ds.dataset_id) as dataset_id, species from @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@dataset_species ds, @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@AvailableUserDatasets where dataset_id = user_dataset_id and is_owner = 1

sqlQuery.name: outcomes
sqlQuery.sql: select CONCAT('EDAUD_', dataset_id) as dataset_id, outcome from @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@dataset_outcome, @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@AvailableUserDatasets where dataset_id = user_dataset_id and is_owner = 1

sqlQuery.name: characteristics
sqlQuery.sql: SELECT CONCAT('EDAUD_', dataset_id) as dataset_id, study_design, study_type FROM @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@dataset_characteristics, @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@AvailableUserDatasets where dataset_id = user_dataset_id and is_owner = 1

sqlQuery.name: sampleTypes
sqlQuery.sql: SELECT CONCAT('EDAUD_', dataset_id) as dataset_id, st.type as sample_type FROM @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@dataset_sample_type st, @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@AvailableUserDatasets where dataset_id = user_dataset_id and is_owner = 1

sqlQuery.name: dois
sqlQuery.sql: select CONCAT('EDAUD_', dd.dataset_id) as dataset_id, doi, dd.description from @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@dataset_doi dd, @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@AvailableUserDatasets where dataset_id = user_dataset_id and is_owner = 1

sqlQuery.name: bioprojectIds
sqlQuery.sql: select CONCAT('EDAUD_', dbi.dataset_id) as dataset_id, bioproject_id, dbi.description from @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@dataset_bioproject_id dbi, @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@AvailableUserDatasets where dataset_id = user_dataset_id and is_owner = 1

sqlQuery.name: LinkedDatasets
sqlQuery.sql: SELECT CONCAT('EDAUD_', dataset_id) as dataset_id, linked_dataset_id FROM @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@dataset_link, @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@AvailableUserDatasets where dataset_id = user_dataset_id and is_owner = 1
